# Ticket 8: Documentation & Developer Setup

**Labels**: documentation, medium, phase1
**Assignee**: TBD
**Priority**: Medium
**Estimated Time**: 2-3 days
**Dependencies**: All previous tickets

## Description
Update documentation and setup instructions for new developers.

## Problem Statement
Current setup may be confusing for new team members. Documentation needs to reflect current state and working procedures.

## Tasks
1. Update README with current project status
2. Create developer onboarding guide
3. Document DEX integration process
4. Create troubleshooting guide
5. Update API documentation

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Updated README reflecting current state
- [ ] Developer onboarding guide
- [ ] DEX integration documentation
- [ ] Troubleshooting guide for common issues
- [ ] Complete API documentation

## Technical Details
- Document verified DEX addresses
- Document token address standards
- Document deployment procedures
- Document testing procedures

## Files to Modify/Create
- `/README.md` - main documentation
- `/docs/DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md` - onboarding guide
- `/docs/DEX_INTEGRATION.md` - integration process
- `/docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md` - troubleshooting
- `/docs/API.md` - API documentation

## Testing Requirements
- Documentation should be accurate
- New developers should be able to set up project
- All procedures should be testable

## Notes
- Keep documentation in sync with code
- Include examples where possible
- Consider visual diagrams for architecture
- Update as system evolves
